rationale.R1.6: The revision significantly improves the writing polish by eliminating redundancy and tightening the paragraph while preserving all substantive facts.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty regarding model names and specific figures, but does not provide a comprehensive disclosure for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed dimensions without any drift from the original content.
rationale.RX.4: The revision avoids introducing new errors or harmful content and maintains the integrity of the original information.
rationale.RX.5: Most changes are annotated with reasons, but not every non-cosmetic change is explicitly traced to a source.
